stages.concept:
# Unit 085: 접속사 (양보) though, although, even if - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 양보를 나타내는 접속사 **though, although, even if**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **although / though** — ~이지만, 비록 ~일지라도

> **Although** it was raining, he went out.
> 비가 오고 있었지만, 그는 외출했다.

> **Though** she is young, she is very mature.
> 그녀는 어리지만, 매우 성숙하다.

> I enjoyed the movie **though** it was long.
> 영화가 길었지만, 나는 즐겼다.

**Q. 다음 중 접속사 although와 의미가 가장 비슷한 것은?**
1. because
2. if
3. though ✅

👩‍🏫 선생님: although는 though보다 **격식적**이에요. 의미는 같아요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **even though** — 비록 ~일지라도 (더 강조)

> **Even though** he studied hard, he failed the test.
> 그가 열심히 공부했음에도 불구하고, 시험에 떨어졌다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **even if** — 설사 ~일지라도 (가정의 의미)

> **Even if** it rains, I will go.
> 설사 비가 오더라도, 나는 갈 것이다.

> I won't give up **even if** it is difficult.
> 어렵더라도 포기하지 않을 것이다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: though/although(~이지만 — 사실), even if(설사 ~라도 — 가정)! 의미 차이를 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 085: 접속사(양보) though, although, even if - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
(     ) I can't sing well, I love to go to karaoke.
> **정답** Although (Though)

---

**02.** ? it rains, I will go to the concert.
> **정답** Even if

---

**03.** ? she was tired, she finished her homework.
> **정답** Although (Though)

---

**04.** ? he doesn't like me, I will be kind.
> **정답** Even if

---

**05.** ? it was cold, they played outside.
> **정답** Although (Though)

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Although she was tired, but she kept studying.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** but 삭제 (although와 but 함께 못 씀)

---

**07.** Though he is rich, but he is not happy.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** but 삭제

---

**08.** Even if it will rain, I will go out.
(시간/조건절 현재시제)
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** will rain → rains

---

**09.** Although he was angry, but he didn't say anything.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** but 삭제

---

**10.** Though she is young, but she is very smart.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** but 삭제

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
비가 와도 나는 갈 것이다.
it rains, I will go.
> **정답** Even if

---

**12.** 피곤했지만 운동을 했다.
I was tired, I exercised.
> **정답** Although (Though)

---

**13.** 그가 화가 나더라도 나는 사과할 것이다.
he is angry, I will apologize.
> **정답** Even if

---

**14.** 비록 어렵지만 포기하지 마라.
it is hard, don't give up.
> **정답** Although (Though)

---

**15.** 설사 실패하더라도 다시 시도할 것이다.
I fail, I will try again.
> **정답** Even if

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
비록 아팠지만 학교에 갔다.
Although was I sick I went to school
> **정답** Although / I / was / sick / I / went / to / school

---

**17.** 설사 늦더라도 나는 갈 것이다.
Even if am I late I will go
> **정답** Even / if / I / am / late / I / will / go

---

**18.** 비록 비가 왔지만 축구를 했다.
Though rained it we played soccer
> **정답** Though / it / rained / we / played / soccer

---

**19.** 비록 어렵지만 열심히 할 것이다.
Although is it difficult I will work hard
> **정답** Although / it / is / difficult / I / will / work / hard

---

**20.** 설사 그가 반대하더라도 나는 할 것이다.
Even if disagrees he I will do it
> **정답** Even / if / he / disagrees / I / will / do / it
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 085: 접속사(양보) though, although, even if - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ he cooked hard, the food was not delicious.
If
Although
Because
Until
> **정답** Although

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ she was in a hurry, she was late.
If
When
Since
Though
> **정답** Though

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I like math, _______ it's hard.
if
after
even if
before
> **정답** even if

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
__________ they were invited, they didn't go to the
party.
Though
Because
If
Although
> **정답** Although, Though

---

**05.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
Try to submit your assignments.
It is not completed.
→ Try to submit your assignments __________ it is
not completed.
as
even if
because
until
> **정답** even if

---

**06.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은
접속사를 고르시오.
She lied to me.
I forgave her.
→_______ she lied to me, I forgave her.
Since
Although
Because
Until
> **정답** Although

---

**07.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
A: What do you think of him?
B: _______ he is very kind, I don't like him.
If
Though
Because
When
> **정답** Though

---

**08.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Although the mountain was very rough, we climbed
to the top.
Becuase the mountain was very rough, we
climbed to the top.
Though the mountain was very rough, we
climbed to the top.
When the mountain was very rough, we
climbed to the top.
The mountain was very rough, but we climbed
to the top.
> **정답** Though the mountain was very rough, we climbed to
the top., The mountain was very rough, but we
climbed to the top.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두
고르시오. (2개)
그녀가 모든 일을 했지만, 아무도 그것을 몰랐다.
Though she did all the work, no one knew it.
Even if she did all the work, no one knew it.
Because she did all the work, no one knew it.
Although she did all the work, no one knew it.
> **정답** Although she did all the work, no one knew it.,
Though she did all the work, no one knew it.

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
만약 내일 비가 올지라도 나는 놀이공원에 갈 것이다.
If it rains tomorrow, I will go to the
amusement park.
Because it rains tomorrow, I will go to the
amusement park.
Even if it rains tomorrow, I will go to the
amusement park.
While it rains tomorrow, I will go to the
amusement park.
> **정답** Even if it rains tomorrow, I will go to the amusement
park.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 접속사를 순서대로 알맞게 연결한
것을 고르시오.
I held my hat tightly _______ it was very windy.
I won't believe her _______ she tells the truth.
because - even if
although - so
although - though
because - so
> **정답** because - even if

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 접속사를 순서대로 알맞게 연결한
것을 고르시오.
____________ my car is very old, it still runs very well.
She went to the restaurant __________ she was
hungry.
Although - because
If - because
Although - until
If - after
> **정답** Although - because

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
She fell asleep on the sofa while I was
cooking.
We arrived at school before the class began.
Because he ran very fast, he lost the final race.
Although she was poor, she was happy.
> **정답** Because he ran very fast, he lost the final race.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
He was so angry that he cried out.
Though he tried not to cry, he couldn't help
crying.
Because I drank very much water, we are still
very thirsty.
Although she is still 14 years old, she started
her own business.
> **정답** Because I drank very much water, we are still very
thirsty.

---

**15.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 알맞은 것을
고르시오.
A: What will you do if it snows tomorrow?
B: I will go jogging _______ it snows tomorrow.
so
since
even if
because
> **정답** even if

---

**16.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
비록 Tom은 그 영화를 보았지만 전혀 기억나지 않았다.
If Tom watched the movie, he couldn't
remember it at all.
Although Tom watched the movie, he
couldn't remember it at all.
Because Tom watched the movie, he couldn't
remember it at all.
Tom watched the movie, although he
couldn't remember it at all.
> **정답** Although Tom watched the movie, he couldn't
remember it at all.

---

**17.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
만약 그녀가 훌륭한 선수일지라도 팀과 함께해야 한다.
Even if she is a great player, she should be
with the team.
She is a great player, because she should be
with the team.
she is a great player, even if she should be
with the team.
As she is a great player, she should be with the
team.
> **정답** Even if she is a great player, she should be with the
team.

---

**18.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오. [2개]
__________________, it was still cold.
Though it was spring
Although it was spring
Because it was spring
If it was spring
> **정답** Although it was spring, Though it was spring

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Because the movie was
interesting, it did not become
famous.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** Because → Although (Though)

---

**20.** 빈 칸에 알맞은 접속사를 쓰시오.
만약 내가 많은 돈이 있다고 해도, 나는 큰 집에서 살지는
않을 것이다.
I have much money, I will not
live in a big house.
> **정답** Even if
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 085 접속사(양보) though, although, even if중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 것을 선택하여 빈칸에 써 넣으시오.
[if. until, although]
그는 비록 취직에 실패했지만 포기하지 않았다.
 he failed to get a job , he didn't give up.
정답 Although

---

**02.** 다음 중 알맞은 것을 선택하여 빈칸에 써 넣으시오.
[if. because, though]
음식은 맛있었지만, 그녀는 많이 먹을 수 없었다.
 the food was delicious, she couldn't eat
much.
정답 Though

---

**03.** 다음 중 알맞은 것을 선택하여 빈칸에 써 넣으시오.
[as. because, even if]
문제가 어려울지라도, 답은 있다.
 the problem is difficult, there is
an answer.
정답 Even if

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
비록 그 집은 작았지만 그는 그 집에 만족했다.
힌트 (     ) be, the house, small
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , he was
satisfied with it.
정답 Although (Though), the, house, was, small

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
만약 너가 택시를 탈지라도 너는 비행기를 놓칠 거예요.
힌트 (     ) take a taxi
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , you
will still miss your plane.
정답 Even, if, you, take, a, taxi

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
비록 그는 빠르게 달렸지만 도둑을 잡지 못했다.
힌트 (     ) run, fast
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , he didn't catch the
thief.
정답 Although (Though), he, ran, fast

---

**07.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
만약 그가 실수를 할지라도 우리는 그를 탓하지 않을 것이
다.
힌트 (     ) make a mistake
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , we
won't blame him.
정답 Even, if, he, makes, a, mistake

---

**08.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
비록 우리는 수업이 없었지만 학교에 갔다.
힌트 (     ) don't, have, although, class
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , we went to
school.
정답 Although, we, didn't, have, class

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
만약 그 공연이 지루할지라도 나는 끝까지 볼 것이다.
힌트 (     ) the, performance, be, boring, even, if
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , I will
see it through.
정답 Even, if, the, performance, is, boring

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
비록 손을 다쳤지만 그녀는 경기를 계속했다.
힌트 (     ) she, her, hand, hurt, although
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) , she
continued to play the piano.
정답 Although, she, hurt, her, hand

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 085: 접속사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ he practiced hard, the result was not good.
If Although Because Until
> 정답: Although

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
_______ she was in a hurry, she was late.
If When Since Though
> 정답: Though

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I like science, _______ it's difficult. if after even if before
> 정답: even if

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 알맞은 것을 모두 고르시오.
__________ they were invited, they didn't come to the event.
Though Because If Although
> 정답: Although, Though

---

**05.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
Try to submit your report.
It is not finished. → Try to submit your report __________ it is not finished. as even if because until
> 정답: even if

---

**06.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 만들 때 빈칸에 알맞은 접속사를 고르시오.
He lied to me.
I forgave him. →_______ he lied to me, I forgave him.
Since Although Because Until
> 정답: Although

---

**07.** 다음 대화문에서 빈칸에 들어갈 말로 가장 알맞은 것을 고르시오.
A: What do you think of her?
B: _______ she is very talented, I don't like her attitude.
If Though Because When
> 정답: Though

---

**08.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Although the trail was very steep, we hiked to the top.
Because the trail was very steep, we hiked to the top.
Though the trail was very steep, we hiked to the top.
When the trail was very steep, we hiked to the top.
The trail was very steep, but we hiked to the top.
> 정답: Though the trail was very steep, we hiked to

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 그가 모든 일을 했지만, 아무도 그것을 알아주지 않았다.
Though he did all the work, no one appreciated it.
Even if he did all the work, no one appreciated it.
Because he did all the work, no one appreciated it.
Although he did all the work, no one appreciated it.
> 정답: Although he did all the work, no one appreciated it.,

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
만약 내일 눈이 올지라도 나는 축구를 할 것이다.
If it snows tomorrow, I will play soccer.
Because it snows tomorrow, I will play soccer.
Even if it snows tomorrow, I will play soccer.
While it snows tomorrow, I will play soccer.
> 정답: Even if it snows tomorrow, I will play soccer.

---

**11.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 접속사를 순서대로 알맞게 연결한 것을 고르시오.
I held my scarf tightly _______ it was very cold.
I won't trust him _______ he tells the truth. because - even if although - so although - though because - so
> 정답: because - even if

---

**12.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 접속사를 순서대로 알맞게 연결한 것을 고르시오.
____________ my bike is very old, it still works very well.
She went to the café __________ she was thirsty.
Although - because If - because Although - until If - after
> 정답: Although - because

---

**13.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
She fell asleep on the sofa while I was studying.
We arrived at school before the lesson began.
Because he ran very fast, he lost the final race.
Although she was tired, she kept working.
> 정답: Because he ran very fast, he lost the final race.

---

**14.** 밑줄 친 부분이 문맥상 어색한 것을 고르시오.
He was so nervous that he made mistakes.
Though he tried not to worry, he couldn't stop thinking.
Because I drank very much juice, we are still very thirsty.
Although she is still 13 years old, she started her own blog.
